title: RapidMeta Infectious Disease | Long-Acting Cabotegravir + Rilpivirine for HIV Treatment v1.0
hero_h2: Long-Acting Cabotegravir + Rilpivirine for Maintenance HIV Antiretroviral Therapy
nyt_headline: The Long-Acting Cabotegravir HIV ART Evidence

pico.pop: Adults living with HIV-1, virologically suppressed (HIV-1 RNA <50 copies/mL) on stable oral antiretroviral therapy
pico.int: Long-acting cabotegravir 600 mg + rilpivirine 900 mg IM injections every 4 weeks (ATLAS, FLAIR) or every 8 weeks (ATLAS-2M Q8W arm)
pico.comp: Continued oral antiretroviral therapy (ATLAS, FLAIR) or LA injection every 4 weeks (ATLAS-2M comparator)
pico.out: HIV-1 RNA >=50 copies/mL at week 48 (treatment failure, snapshot ITT; primary in all three trials, non-inferiority margin 6%)
pico.subgroup: Sex, race, baseline regimen class (NNRTI / INSTI / PI), age, body-mass index, time on prior ART

real_data_entries.name: ATLAS
real_data_entries.group: Switch from oral ART to LA cabotegravir + rilpivirine Q4W vs continued oral ART; HIV-1 RNA >=50 c/mL at week 48 (snapshot, treatment failure)

allOutcomes.title: HIV-1 RNA >=50 copies/mL at week 48 (primary, treatment failure; non-inferior)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Swindells S et al. NEJM 2020;382:1112-1123 (ATLAS).

real_data_entries.name: FLAIR
real_data_entries.group: Switch to LA cabotegravir + rilpivirine Q4W after 20-week DTG/ABC/3TC induction vs continued oral DTG/ABC/3TC; HIV-1 RNA >=50 c/mL at week 48

allOutcomes.title: HIV-1 RNA >=50 copies/mL at week 48 (primary, treatment failure; non-inferior)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Orkin C et al. NEJM 2020;382:1124-1135 (FLAIR).

real_data_entries.name: ATLAS-2M
real_data_entries.group: LA cabotegravir + rilpivirine every 8 weeks vs every 4 weeks; HIV-1 RNA >=50 c/mL at week 48 (Q8W vs Q4W non-inferiority)

allOutcomes.title: HIV-1 RNA >=50 copies/mL at week 48 (primary, Q8W vs Q4W; non-inferior)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Overton ET et al. Lancet 2021;396:1994-2005 (ATLAS-2M Q8W vs Q4W).
